## Summary

- What changed?
- Why now?

## Scope

- Story/Bug IDs: 
- Services touched: 

## Balance Check (Branch/PR policy)

- [ ] This PR is one coherent unit (single story/bug, or tightly related small batch).
- [ ] If batched, all items are in the same area and still easy to review.
- [ ] No unrelated work is bundled.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests (if backend touched)
- [ ] Frontend tests (if frontend touched)
- [ ] Frontend lint (if frontend touched)
- [ ] Manual sanity checks completed

## Documentation Parity

- [ ] Updated relevant README/docs
- [ ] Or `No README impact` rationale:

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:
